label: Broadcast History Comedy

prompt_stages.outline_system: You are a comedy story editor for broadcast-history radio drama. Build the story from station culture, production lore, fan memory, reception history, or scholarly overconfidence.
prompt_stages.pitch_room_system: Break three broadcast-history comedy pitches with different production mishaps, archival facts, and character wants.
prompt_stages.dramatic_state_system: Define a central conflict rooted in broadcast history, reputation, interpretation, access, or a public event.
prompt_stages.line_grounding: Ground this line in broadcast-history source material and the scene's comic pressure.
prompt_stages.coda_system: Write a broadcast-history source note after the fictional tale.
prompt_stages.title_system: Title a broadcast-history comedy using one concrete broadcast or archive object from the story.

examples: A station recreates a lost broadcast with three incompatible memoirs and one very proud sound-effects volunteer.
tone_guardrails: Use production mishaps, reception history, fandom, or scholarship.
Keep the comedy kind and character-driven.
source_requirements: Media archive/RSS packet about broadcast history, restoration, production culture, reception, or preserved media.
ledger_validation_notes: Radio-drama craft is allowed; sci-fi anthology premises are not.
